reviews.review_title: A true gem, thrilling and fun !!
reviews.review_description:
Strange things popping out of thin air and coming after you...check!!
Running around like crazy, while shooting at stuff.....check!!
Amazing visuals and suspenseful music....check!!
Would I buy it after trying the demo??.....YEP...ALREADY HAVE !!!
Improve the visuals and graphics etc.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Will do on our next update!
